summary: SINGLE_FOCUS NumberPlane: wobbly simple closed curve r(θ)=2 + 0.5 cos 3θ + 0.3 sin 5θ. 6 test points classified GREEN (inside) or RED (outside) via ray-cast intersection count. ValueTracker scan_tr sweeps a probe dot along y=-1.9 line; always_redraw YELLOW dashed ray + probe dot recolored based on live inside/outside classification.
